intended_use_full: aPROMISE X is intended to be used by healthcare professionals and researchers for acceptance, transfer, storage, image display, manipulation, quantification and reporting of digital medical images. The system is intended to be used with images acquired using nuclear medicine (NM) imaging, using PSMA PET/CT. The device provides general Picture Archiving and Communications System (PACS) tools as well as a clinical application for oncology including marking of regions of interest and quantitative analysis.
target_condition: Prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA) avid lesions in PSMA PET/CT imaging
ground_truth: NEMA digital reference phantom for accuracy, linearity, and limit of detection; clinician manual measurements for analytical performance comparison
other_metrics: All SUV and volume quantification tests met predetermined acceptance criteria; aPROMISE X demonstrated more reproducible and efficient automated quantification compared to manual clinician measurements while maintaining diagnostic performance
